name: passwordhash
title: passwordHash
description: A dictionary that contains the password hash for the account.

payloadkeys.title: SALTED-SHA512-PBKDF2
payloadkeys.content: A dictionary that contains the `entropy`, `iterations`, and `salt` elements to create the password hash using the CommonCrypto libraries, or equivalent. Convert this dictionary to binary data before setting it as the value for the password hash.

subkeys.title: Entropy
subkeys.content: The derived key from the password hash; for example, from `CCKeyDerivationPBKDF()`.

subkeys.title: Iterations
subkeys.content: The number of iterations; for example, from `CCCalibratePBKDF()` using a minimum hash time of 100 milliseconds, or if unknown, a number in the range of 20,000 to 40,000 iterations.

subkeys.title: Salt
subkeys.content: The 32-byte randomized data; for example, from `CCRandomCopyBytes()`.
